creator: Ed Lacy
description: LibriVox recording of Sin In Their Blood by Ed Lacy. Read in English by Ben Tucker. He Never Looked for Trouble - It Came to Him Naturally! MATT ISN'T LOOKING FOR TROUBLE in spite of his reputation as the toughest private eye in town--feels he's changed since what he's been through-fighting in Korea... MATT ISN'T LOOKING FOR TROUBLE the night they find the blonde-very luscious and very dead-but somebody doesn't like Matt's being there-and soon lets him know it... BUT MATT DOESN'T WAIT FOR TROUBLE TO FIND HIM when he knows the same killer is threatening a girl he wants-whose kisses are too warm and alive to be put on ice by bullets! WITH HATE IN HIS HEART AND A .45 IN HIS HAND, MATT RANZINO WALKS THE CITY-SO WATCH OUT, TROUBLE-THIS TIME MATT'S LOOKING FOR YOU!!! - Summary by Back cover of first edition For further information, including links to online text, reader information, RSS feeds, CD cover or other formats (if available), please go to the LibriVox catalog page for this recording. For more free audio books or to become a volunteer reader, visit librivox.org . M4B Audiobook (116MB)
